# The Fly Trap — A Finer Diner (Complete)

Neighborhood diner on Woodward Ave in Ferndale, Michigan. American comfort food with global cooks' tables since 2004 — pho, Thai peanut, Italian, breakfast all day. Featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives.

## Essential Pages

- Home: https://theflytrapferndale.com/ — the front door
- Menu: https://theflytrapferndale.com/menu — full menu with categories
- Order: https://theflytrapferndale.com/order — online ordering
- Shop: https://theflytrapferndale.com/shop — Swat Sauces, gift cards, branded merchandise
- About: https://theflytrapferndale.com/about — origin story, the art, the space, the return
- Press: https://theflytrapferndale.com/press — press coverage and Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives feature
- FAQ: https://theflytrapferndale.com/faq — answers to common questions
- Visit: https://theflytrapferndale.com/visit — hours, location, parking, accessibility, dog policy

## Brand Facts

- Address: 22950 Woodward Ave, Ferndale, MI 48220
- Phone: (248) 399-5150
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8am–3pm
- Owners: Kara and Gavin McMillian (returned to ownership October 2024)
- Opened: December 28, 2004
- Taglines: "a finer diner" (primary), "Under Old Management" (secondary), "Catch a Buzz" (drinks menu)
- Origin handle: "Buzzin' since 2004"
- Cuisine: American diner with global influences (Vietnamese pho, Thai peanut chicken, Italian, Asian-inspired options)
- Price range: $$ (moderate)
- Signature dishes: Gingerbread Waffles, The Forager, Lemongrass Pho Bowl, Red Chili Salmon Burger, Green Eggs and Ham, Thai Peanut Chicken, Cowboy Curtis, Red Flannel Hash, Veggie Rumble
- Retail: Swat Sauces (housemade hot sauces), gift cards, branded t-shirts
- Pet policy: Dog-friendly outdoor seating
- Food options: Vegetarian and vegan options available
- Features: Fly artwork throughout the space, marble-inlay bar top, checkerboard floor, fire-engine red walls
- TV: Featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Visiting

**What are The Fly Trap's hours?**
Open Monday through Sunday, 8 a.m. to 3 p.m.

**Where is The Fly Trap located?**
22950 Woodward Ave, Ferndale, MI 48220.

**Is there parking at The Fly Trap?**
Yes, there is ample parking available.

**Is The Fly Trap dog-friendly?**
Yes, The Fly Trap welcomes dogs in the outdoor seating area.

**Does The Fly Trap take reservations?**
The Fly Trap operates on a walk-in basis. No reservations.

**Is The Fly Trap wheelchair accessible?**
Yes, the entrance and interior are wheelchair accessible.

### Food

**What kind of food does The Fly Trap serve?**
American comfort food with global influences, ranging from traditional diner fare to Vietnamese pho, Thai-inspired dishes, and vegetarian options.

**Does The Fly Trap have vegan options?**
Yes, vegan options are available on the menu.

**Does The Fly Trap have vegetarian options?**
Yes, vegetarian options are available on the menu.

**Is The Fly Trap gluten-free friendly?**
Coming from Sanity — please verify current offerings.

**What are The Fly Trap's most popular dishes?**
Signature items include Gingerbread Waffles, The Forager, Lemongrass Pho Bowl, Red Chili Salmon Burger, Green Eggs and Ham, Thai Peanut Chicken, Cowboy Curtis, Red Flannel Hash, and Veggie Rumble.

**Does The Fly Trap serve alcohol?**
Coming from Sanity — please verify current beverage menu.

### The Business

**When did The Fly Trap open?**
December 28, 2004.

**Who owns The Fly Trap?**
Kara and Gavin McMillian are the original founders and current owners, having returned to ownership in October 2024.

**Has The Fly Trap been on TV?**
Yes, The Fly Trap was featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives.

**What does "a finer diner" mean?**
It is the primary tagline, capturing the restaurant's positioning: comfort food cooked with care in a diner setting, decorated with personality and pride rather than indifference or minimalism.

**Where did the name "Fly Trap" come from?**
Coming from Sanity — please verify origin story.

**What does "Under Old Management" mean?**
It is the secondary tagline, displayed on receipts and signage. The McMillians use it to playfully signal their return to ownership in October 2024 — a warm, self-aware flip of the typical "Under New Management" sign.

**Did The Fly Trap change owners?**
Kara and Gavin McMillian opened The Fly Trap in 2004 and operated it until 2021. They temporarily closed due to burnout and staffing challenges after the pandemic. In February 2022, they sold to Matt Buskard, a long-time regular and owner of Bobcat Bonnie's. In October 2024, Buskard transferred operations back to the McMillians, who continue to run the restaurant today.

**Are the original owners back at The Fly Trap?**
Yes. The McMillians returned to full ownership and operation in October 2024 and have been running the restaurant ever since.

### Ordering

**Can I order from The Fly Trap online?**
Online ordering through Toast is Coming Soon. Sign up at the site to be notified when it launches.

**Does The Fly Trap deliver?**
Coming from Sanity — please verify current delivery partnerships.

**Can I buy Swat Sauce online?**
Yes, Swat Sauces and other retail items are available in the online shop.

**Does The Fly Trap sell gift cards?**
Yes, gift cards are available for purchase in-store and online.

## Menu Summary

The menu is organized by category and reflects the restaurant's blend of American diner classics with global influences:

- All Things Eggs — traditional and creative egg dishes
- Oh Sugar Shack — breakfast pastries, waffles, and sweet plates
- Green Things — vegetarian and vegan options
- Between Bread — sandwiches and burgers
- Other Stuff — specials and other featured items
- Drinks — including house hot sauces branded as "Catch a Buzz"

Signature standouts: Gingerbread Waffles, The Forager (egg, mushroom, gouda), Lemongrass Pho Bowl, Red Chili Salmon Burger, Thai Peanut Chicken.

For the full current menu, visit https://theflytrapferndale.com/menu.

## Press

The Fly Trap has been featured in major press outlets including:

- Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives (national broadcast feature)
- Detroit News (reviews and lifestyle coverage)
- Regional and local dining publications

For complete press coverage, visit https://theflytrapferndale.com/press.

## Visit Information

Address: 22950 Woodward Ave, Ferndale, MI 48220
Phone: (248) 399-5150
Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8am–3pm
Parking: On-site lot available
Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible
Outdoor seating: Dog-friendly

Directions and additional details: https://theflytrapferndale.com/visit

## About This Restaurant

The Fly Trap opened in December 2004 under the ownership of Kara and Gavin McMillian. Over two decades, it has become a Ferndale institution known for its unapologetic personality, joyful design (fire-engine red walls, checkerboard floors, marble-inlay bar top, extensive fly artwork), and commitment to bold, well-executed food. After temporarily stepping back, the McMillians returned to full ownership in October 2024 to continue the legacy.

The restaurant's design philosophy is expressed through its fly artwork — depicting flies in human situations. As a manifesto: take something the world has decided to dismiss, give it dignity and personality, and watch people fall in love with it. This principle applies to every element, from the building (an ordinary strip-mall storefront painted unmissable yellow-green) to the menu (utilitarian comfort food made specific and funny through thoughtful naming and execution).

For the full story, visit https://theflytrapferndale.com/about.

## Photo & Content Usage

The Fly Trap welcomes photographs in the restaurant. Please tag @theflytrapferndale on Instagram when sharing. User-generated content may be featured on the site and social channels with attribution.

Identifiable people in published photos require explicit consent. When in doubt, ask before posting.

## Important Note

The website at theflytrapferndale.net dates from prior ownership (2022–2024 under Matt Buskard) and has not been updated since the McMillians' return to ownership in October 2024. The canonical current website is theflytrapferndale.com, which reflects the current ownership and brand positioning.
